static_functions.name: Call
static_functions.description: Triggers a local custom Event across all Packages on the same side (Client ➔ Client OR Server ➔ Server)
static_functions.description_long:
Triggers a local custom Event across all Packages on the same side (Client ➔ Client OR Server ➔ Server)
Must be caught using Events.Subscribe()

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to trigger the event

parameters.name: args...
parameters.description: Arguments to pass to the event

static_functions.name: CallRemote
static_functions.description: Triggers a remote custom Event from the Client to the Server (Client ➔ Server)
static_functions.description_long:
Triggers a remote custom Event from the Client to the Server (Client ➔ Server)
The receiving Server will implicitly receive the sender 'Player' as the very first argument before your custom args
Must be caught using Events.SubscribeRemote()

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to trigger the event

parameters.name: reliability
parameters.description: The network reliability rule

parameters.name: args...
parameters.description: Arguments to pass to the event

static_functions.name: CallRemote
static_functions.description: Triggers a remote custom Event from the Server to the Client (Server ➔ Client)
static_functions.description_long:
Triggers a remote custom Event from the Server to the Client (Server ➔ Client)
Must be caught using Events.SubscribeRemote()

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to trigger the event

parameters.name: player
parameters.description: The remote player to send this event

parameters.name: reliability
parameters.description: The network reliability rule

parameters.name: args...
parameters.description: Arguments to pass to the event

static_functions.name: CallRemotePlayers
static_functions.description: Triggers a remote custom Event from the Server to an array of specific Players (Server ➔ Clients)
static_functions.description_long:
Triggers a remote custom Event from the Server to an array of specific Players (Server ➔ Clients)
More network-efficient than looping CallRemote
Must be caught using Events.SubscribeRemote() on the Clients

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to trigger the event

parameters.name: players
parameters.description: The remote players to send this event

parameters.name: reliability
parameters.description: The network reliability rule

parameters.name: args...
parameters.description: Arguments to pass to the event

static_functions.name: BroadcastRemote
static_functions.description: Broadcasts a remote custom Event from the Server to ALL currently connected Players (Server ➔ Clients)
static_functions.description_long:
Broadcasts a remote custom Event from the Server to ALL currently connected Players (Server ➔ Clients)
Must be caught using Events.SubscribeRemote() on the Clients

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to trigger the event

parameters.name: reliability
parameters.description: The network reliability rule

parameters.name: args...
parameters.description: Arguments to pass to the event

static_functions.name: BroadcastRemoteDimension
static_functions.description: Broadcasts a remote custom Event from the Server to all Players currently residing in the specified Dimension (Server ➔ Clients)
static_functions.description_long:
Broadcasts a remote custom Event from the Server to all Players currently residing in the specified Dimension (Server ➔ Clients)
Must be caught using Events.SubscribeRemote() on the Clients

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to trigger the event

parameters.name: dimension
parameters.description: The Dimension to send this event

parameters.name: reliability
parameters.description: The network reliability rule

parameters.name: args...
parameters.description: Arguments to pass to the event

static_functions.name: BroadcastRemoteInRadius
static_functions.description: Broadcasts a remote custom Event from the Server to all Players within a specific location radius (Server ➔ Clients)
static_functions.description_long:
Broadcasts a remote custom Event from the Server to all Players within a specific location radius (Server ➔ Clients)
Must be caught using Events.SubscribeRemote() on the Clients

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to trigger the event

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: The location used to calculate the event radius

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The radius to send this event

parameters.name: reliability
parameters.description: The network reliability rule

parameters.name: args...
parameters.description: Arguments to pass to the event

static_functions.name: BroadcastRemoteInRadiusDimension
static_functions.description: Broadcasts a remote custom Event from the Server to all Players within a specific location radius AND residing in a specific Dimension (Server ➔ Clients)
static_functions.description_long:
Broadcasts a remote custom Event from the Server to all Players within a specific location radius AND residing in a specific Dimension (Server ➔ Clients)
Must be caught using Events.SubscribeRemote() on the Clients

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to trigger the event

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: The location used to calculate the event radius

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The radius to send this event

parameters.name: dimension
parameters.description: The Dimension to send this event

parameters.name: reliability
parameters.description: The network reliability rule

parameters.name: args...
parameters.description: Arguments to pass to the event

static_functions.name: Subscribe
static_functions.description: Listens for a local custom Event triggered by Events.Call() on the same side

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to subscribe

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to execute

static_functions.name: SubscribeRemote
static_functions.description: Listens for a network custom Event
static_functions.description_long:
Listens for a network custom Event
If on the Server, it catches Events.CallRemote() from Clients (receiving the sender 'Player' as the first argument)
If on the Client, it catches Server broadcasts and remote calls

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to subscribe

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to execute

static_functions.name: Unsubscribe
static_functions.description: Removes a local event listener previously registered with Events.Subscribe()
static_functions.description_long: Removes a local event listener previously registered with Events.Subscribe(). If no specific callback function is passed, it removes ALL local listeners for that event name in the current Package

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to unsubscribe

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to unsubscribe

static_functions.name: UnsubscribeRemote
static_functions.description: Removes a network event listener previously registered with Events.SubscribeRemote()
static_functions.description_long: Removes a network event listener previously registered with Events.SubscribeRemote(). If no specific callback function is passed, it removes ALL remote listeners for that event name in the current Package

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: The Event Name to unsubscribe

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to unsubscribe
